article_title: Serilog 在 .NET 中的完整指南：从安装到生产级结构化日志
core_theme: Serilog 在 ASP.NET Core 中的接入：两阶段引导 → appsettings.json 配置 → Sink/Enricher 使用 → 结构化请求日志
reader_takeaway: 学会在 ASP.NET Core 中接入 Serilog 生产级结构化日志，包括 Sink 配置、Enricher 使用和请求日志中间件
summary_angle: 从 MEL 内置的简单 Console 日志 → Serilog 三阶段管线（Enricher → Filter → Sink）输出结构化、可查询的生产级日志

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文两阶段初始化 + appsettings.json 配置
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：初始化安装，NuGet 包和 Program.cs 代码引导

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文管线架构——Enricher → Filter → Sink，以及 100+ Sink
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心：三阶段管线流动，Enricher 追加属性，Filter 过滤，Sink 分路输出到 Console/File/Seq

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 UseSerilogRequestLogging 结构化请求日志
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧：一条结构化 HTTP 请求日志条目（Method/Path/Status/Elapsed）进入仪表盘

main_metaphor: 日志从简单的文本流转变为经过三道工序处理的结构化数据产品
primary_subject: 一条从左到右的日志处理管线：原始日志进入 → 经过三个处理站（Enricher/Filter/Sink）→ 输出到多个目的地
subject_action: 日志事件从左向右流过三个处理站，每个站做一次附加值处理
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: watercolor comic illustration, translucent washes, visible paper texture, soft edges, light ink structure
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；水彩的流动感和层次叠加适合表达日志管线的 Enricher→Filter→Sink 流水线处理
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证三阶段管线（Enricher→Filter→Sink）的多路输出叙事是否成立
revision_targets: 管线处理站不够清楚时强化视觉区分
三个标签太小或模糊时放大
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: Serilog structured logging pipeline in .NET: package setup → Enricher/Filter/Sink pipeline → structured output to Console/File/Seq.

Summary angle: From simple MEL Console log → Serilog 3-stage pipeline (Enricher → Filter → Sink) producing structured queryable logs to multiple destinations.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. 2.35:1 wide frame.
Information blocks:
- Step (left): NuGet packages installation and Program.cs bootstrap setup — label '安装配置', fact '4 pkg'
- Mechanism (center): 3-stage pipeline Enricher appends properties, Filter screens, Sink distributes to Console/File/Seq — label '管线流水', fact '100+ Sink'
- Takeaway (right): single structured HTTP request log entry with Method/Path/Status/Elapsed flowing into dashboard — label '结构化输出', fact '1 条/请求'

Main metaphor: Log events flowing through a 3-stage processing pipeline to multiple output destinations.
Subject: A diagonal log processing pipeline. Log events enter left raw, pass through three treatment stations (Enricher/Filter/Sink), exit right as structured entries flowing to Console/File/Seq destinations.
Composition: Diagonal progression, left entry to right multi-branch output.
Style: combine editorial technical illustration with selected visual style descriptor: watercolor comic illustration, translucent washes, visible paper texture, soft edges, light ink structure. Stylized, editorial, visually strong. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: indigo blue, teal, warm ochre accent, soft paper white.
Visible text: only 3 Chinese labels: '安装配置', '管线流水', '结构化输出'. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans.
Constraints: no watermark, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake UIs, no fake terminals, no fabricated metrics.
Avoid: code rain, neon lighting, robot figures, cyberpunk colors, fake code editors, decorative clutter.
